steps.t: Radanir has sensed something is wrong, and he is standing by the stopped waggon.
Britou stands before you, a figure of malice that has caused you grief in the recent past. You cannot forgive him, but he appears to offer you no imme…
Radanir has had an idea, and wants to tell it to you.
Radanir is beneath the earth along the Forsaken Road.
You should find the bodies of your fallen friends and pay your respects, and Radanir will begin carrying them out of the Forsaken Road.
You have honoured your kinsmen, and should now speak with Radanir along the Forsaken Road.
